task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title '2024 International Data Science Summit - Post-Event Evaluation' in the LimeSurvey top bar, survey list, or general settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the start and expiry dates are correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the 'Publication & access' settings. The Start date/time must be set to '2025-03-15' (or March 15, 2025) and Expiry date/time must be set to '2025-03-29' (or March 29, 2025).

task_completion.description: Verify the presentation settings for progress bar and backward navigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the 'Presentation' settings. 'Show progress bar' should be enabled (turned On/Yes) and 'Allow backward navigation' should be disabled (turned Off/No).

task_completion.description: Verify the welcome message, thank you message, and End URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in 'Text elements'. The Welcome message must contain the text '2024 International Data Science Summit', a Thank you message must be entered, and the End URL field must exactly match 'https://www.datasciencesummit2024.org/thank-you'.

task_completion.description: Verify the question group and the ranking question are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the survey structure or question editor. There should be a question group named 'Conference Track Preferences'. Inside it, there must be a Ranking question (type 'R') with the title/text 'Please rank the following conference tracks from most to least valuable to you'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 specific answer options are added to the ranking question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the answer options/subquestions screen for the ranking question. The 5 options must be present: 'Machine Learning & Deep Learning', 'Natural Language Processing', 'Computer Vision & Image Analysis', 'Data Engineering & MLOps', and 'Responsible AI & Ethics'.

integrity.description: Agent used the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands, database clients, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the local LimeSurvey URL, not a local HTML file or a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) should be open and actively modifying the DOM to fake the survey settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: '2024 International Data Science Summit - Post-Event Evaluation'. Start Date: 2025-03-15. Expiry Date: 2025-03-29. End URL: 'https://www.datasciencesummit2024.org/thank-you'. Question Type: Ranking (LimeSurvey code 'R'). Answer Options (5): 'Machine Learning & Deep Learning', 'Natural Language Processing', 'Computer Vision & Image Analysis', 'Data Engineering & MLOps', 'Responsible AI & Ethics'.
